hero.headline: The Intelligence Behind the Kitchen.
hero.subheadline: Automate your inventory and master guest hospitality through the app you already use. Meet Xtock & Vostre.
hero.aeo: FoodTech AI deploys two WhatsApp-native AI agents—Xtock for predictive inventory control and Vostre for automated guest hospitality—eliminating the 'Dark Zones' of untracked inventory and disconnected guests in Mexican restaurants.
hero.chatBubble1: Avocado prices are up 12%. Reducing order by 5kg to maintain margin?
hero.chatBubble2: Regular guest 'Sofia' just booked. I've sent her a welcome message.

problem.headline: Your Restaurant Is Bleeding Money in the Shadows.
problem.description: Untracked inventory. Disconnected guests. These are the 'Dark Zones'—the invisible gaps where waste compounds and loyalty evaporates. Every day they go unmonitored, your margins shrink.

ordering.title: Untracked Inventory
ordering.description: Manual ordering decisions made tired, late, and without data. Waste compounds silently across every location—the dark zone your spreadsheet can't see.

delivery.title: Disconnected Guests
delivery.description: No memory. No personalization. Guests visit once and vanish. Without a hospitality system, your best customers are strangers every time.

burnout.title: Operator Burnout
burnout.description: Your managers are human bridges between fragmented tools, making $5,000 decisions at midnight. The cognitive tax of scale is crushing your best people.

solutions.headline: Two AI Agents. One WhatsApp Chat. Zero New Apps.
solutions.description: No dashboards. No training manuals. No new software to learn. Just two intelligent agents that live where you already work—WhatsApp.

xtock.name: Xtock
xtock.description: Xtock tracks your inventory in real-time, predicts your sales, and sends you order reminders via WhatsApp before you run out. Precision in every gram.
features: Real-time inventory tracking across all locations
Predictive sales forecasting that learns your patterns
WhatsApp order reminders before you run out

vostre.name: Vostre
vostre.description: Vostre is your digital concierge. It manages reservations and automates personalized guest loyalty through WhatsApp. Give every guest a 5-star experience, automatically.

howItWorks.headline: From Handshake to Teammate in 8 Days.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: 24-hour white-glove onboarding. We connect to your POS and inventory systems. You don't lift a finger.

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: 48-hour "Time to Value" shift study. Your AI teammates observe your operation and build their understanding.

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: 7-Day Confidence Phase. Every decision requires your approval via WhatsApp. **100% human veto power.**

execute.title: Execute
execute.description: Full autonomy option unlocks after Day 8. Or keep human-in-the-loop forever. Your call.

founder.headline: 20 Years in the Trenches.
founder.quote1: I've spent 20 years in this industry — not behind a screen, but behind a line. I know what it feels like to finish cleaning a greasy kitchen at 11 PM and then sit down to make $5,000 in inventory decisions while you can barely keep your eyes open.
founder.quote2: That's the moment I built FoodTech AI for. Not the boardroom. Not the investor pitch. The midnight moment when a tired operator needs a teammate who's already done the math.
founder.quote3: We don't build software. We build AI teammates that remove the operational drag that keeps good operators from becoming great brands.

faq.headline: Built for Operators Who've Been Burned by Software Before.

badDecision.question: What if the AI makes a bad ordering decision?
badDecision.answer: It can't — not without your approval. During the 7-Day Confidence Phase, every single decision goes through you via WhatsApp. After Day 8, you choose your autonomy level. And you always retain 100% veto power, forever.

onboarding.question: How long does onboarding take?
onboarding.answer: 24 hours to connect. 48 hours to learn. 7 days to build confidence. You'll see value within the first shift study.

integrations.question: What systems do you integrate with?
integrations.answer: We offer white-glove credentialing and connect to major POS and inventory systems. We handle the technical setup entirely — you don't need an IT team.

trial.question: What does a trial look like?
trial.answer: 30-day Xtock trial. 7-day Vostre trial. No contracts. No setup fees. If it doesn't earn its keep, you walk.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Enterprise-grade encryption in transit and at rest. We never sell your data. We never train on your data. Your operational intelligence stays yours.

pricing.question: What's the pricing model?
pricing.answer: We'll share specific pricing during your pilot onboarding call. Our model is designed so the AI pays for itself within the first month through recovered margins and reduced waste.

cta.headline: Stop Managing Software. Start Onboarding Your New Teammates.
cta.description: Join our Founding Pilot Waitlist. Priority given to restaurant operators in Mexico.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card. No contracts. Just a conversation.

form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: We'll be in touch within 48 hours.
form.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: AI teammates for the Mexican restaurant market.

whatsapp.hoverMessage: Vostre AI is online. Ready to optimize your dinner service?

builtFromInside.headline: Built From the Inside of Restaurant Operations.
builtFromInside.description: FoodTech AI was created to solve the problems restaurant teams face every day: uncertainty, manual decision-making, and operational overload. We build AI-native systems designed to integrate into real restaurant workflows, not disrupt them.
builtFromInside.paragraph2: Our approach prioritizes transparency, operator control, and trust, so teams can act with confidence instead of reacting to problems after they happen.
builtFromInside.callout: This isn't AI for dashboards or demos. It's AI designed to work quietly, reliably, and alongside the people running the business.
builtFromInside.imagePlaceholder: Restaurant owner working at their desk
